zh.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uhl於1637年7月4日出生在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。她於大約1659年與Johannes Kumpf在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1717年1月16日在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登享年79歲，埋葬在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uhl于1637年7月4日出生在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。她于大约1659年与Johannes Kumpf在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1717年1月16日在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登享年79岁，埋葬在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Uhl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Czech: from a short form of the personal name   Ulrich  .
North German: nickname from Middle Low German ule ‘owl’ for someone who reminded in some way of the bird.
Czech: perhaps also a nickname or a metonymic occupational name from Czech uh(e)l ‘coal’.

variants.name: Ulrich
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Gerhard, Klaus, Frieda, Fritz, Reinhard, Alfons, Alois, Bernd.

German: from the personal name Ulrich, Old High German Odalrīc, composed of the elements odal ‘inherited property, fortune’ + rīc ‘power’. The name was borne by a 10th-century Christian saint, bishop of Augsburg, whose fame contributed greatly to the popularity of the personal name in German- and Slavic-speaking areas in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Uehlein
meanings: German (also Ühlein): from a pet form of the personal name Uhl .

variants.name: Uhls
meanings: Altered form of German Uhl , with the addition of excrescent -s, a common feature of Americanized surnames.

variants.name: Uhle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Alfons, Kurt.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

nameMeanings.name: Maria
meanings: A name derived from Mapia, one of the Greek forms of Miriam. Maria is found as a male name as well as a female name. Viscount Montague, of Cowdray, Sussex, who succeeded to the title as second viscount, was christened Anthony Maria Browne. In Camden's Remains (p. 44), referred to in Delicie Literarise, occurs Thomas Maria Wingfield; and there was also a Sir Edward Maria Wingfield. The name appears to have been adopted in the latter family from Mary, daughter of Henry VIII. Compare Notes and Queries 5th S. ii. 73, 316, 478. Marie is frequently found as a male name in France and in other parts of the Continent.

en.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uhl was born on 4 July 1637, in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, German Empire. She married Johannes Kumpf about 1659, in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, German Empire. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 16 January 1717, in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, German Empire, at the age of 79, and was buried in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, German Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uhl est née le 4 juillet 1637, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Elle a épousé Johannes Kumpf environ 1659, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 janvier 1717, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich.

de.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uhl wurde am 4. Juli 1637 in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich geboren. Sie hat um 1659 in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich Johannes Kumpf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Januar 1717 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich und wurde in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uhl è nata il il 4 luglio 1637 nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Lei sposato Johannes Kumpf circa 1659, nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 16 gennaio 1717, nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uhlは1637年7月4日にデウトシェス レイチグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンで生まれた。約1659年にデウトシェス レイチグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンでJohannes Kumpfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1717年1月16日にデウトシェス レイチグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンで79歳で死去し，デウトシェス レイチグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uhl(은)는 1637년 7월 4일 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1659년 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 Johannes Kumpf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1717년 1월 16일 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uhl nasceu em 4 de julho de 1637, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Império Alemão. Ela casou-se com Johannes Kumpf aproximadamente 1659, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Império Alemão. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1717, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Império Alemão, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Império Alemão.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uhl родилась 4 июля 1637 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, деуцчесь раич. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johannes Kumpf около 1659 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, деуцчесь раич. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 16 января 1717 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, деуцчесь раич в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, деуцчесь раич.

es.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uhl nació el 4 de julio de 1637, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Se casó con Johannes Kumpf aproximadamente 1659, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 16 de enero de 1717, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich.
